name: Maarselok
location: Maarselok in Lair of Maarselok, Urgarlag Chief-bane

bonuses.stat: When you deal damage with a melee Heavy Attack, you spew a cone of corruption, dealing 1492 Disease damage to enemies over 4 seconds. This damage is increased by 10% for each negative effect the enemies have, up to a maximum of 300%. This effect can occur once every 10 seconds and scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
